text:
is a Japanese screenwriter and novelist. He was born in the Yonago, Tottori.

Works

TV Anime/OVA

Armor Hunter Mellowlink (1988) - Screenplay (5 episodes)
Nadia, the secret of blue water (1990) - Mechanical Design
Orguss 02 (1993) - Screenplay
Neon Genesis Evangelion (anime) (1995) - Script (Eps 16, 22, 23)
GaoGaiGar: King of the Braves (1997) - Script (13 episodes)
Blue Submarine No.6 (1998) - Script
Betterman (1999) - Script (12 episodes), Chief Writer
Argento Soma (2000) - Screenplay (19 episodes), Original Concept, Chief Writer
Gate Keepers (2000) - Series Composition, Script (14 episodes), Original Manga
Gate Keepers 21 (2000) - Director, Script (eps 1-3, 5-6), Storyboard (OP1; eps 1-2), Episode Director (eps 1, 6), Unit Director (OP1), Original story, Key Animation (eps 1-2, 6)
Sentou Yousei Yukikaze (2002) - Script (ep 1), Script Supervision
Desert Punk (2004) - Series Composition, Script (11 episodes)
Aquarion Evol (2008) - Screenplay (Eps: 7, 13, 16, 20, 23)
Muv-Luv Alternative: Total Eclipse (2012) - Script (8 episodes)
Nobunagun (2014) - Series Composition

Published works

2015 The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji (1997) - Writer
Gate Keepers (1999) - Writer

Video Games
 
Neon Genesis Evangelion (Sega Saturn) (1996) - Screenplay
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Second Impression (1997) - Screenplay
